query: SELECT t.id, t.name, t.slug, u.id as user_id, u.name as user_name, u.email, u.role, tm.teamRole FROM tenants t LEFT JOIN users u ON u.tenantId = t.id LEFT JOIN team_members tm ON tm.userId = u.id WHERE t.slug = 'demo-apex' ORDER BY u.id LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT t.id, t.name, t.slug, u.id as user_id, u.name as user_name, u.email, u.role, tm.teamRole FROM tenants t LEFT JOIN users u ON u.tenantId = t.id LEFT JOIN team_members tm ON tm.userId = u.id WHERE t.slug = 'demo-apex' ORDER BY u.id LIMIT 20;
